metadata.description: Curated marketplace of Claude Code plugins — developer frameworks, productivity, accessibility, SEO, writing, DevOps, and more. v1.7.0 ships rad-session 5.0 (intent-vs-reality split, evidence-based docs/status.md replaces HANDOFF.md, sectioned-writer rule with rad-planner for the operating manual, conditional CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md per agent scope, milestone-shipped archive). v1.6.0 shipped rad-planner 4.0 (plan-first workflow, four entry points, four mechanical validators).

plugins.name: rad-code-review
plugins.description: 3-role adversarial code review with diff-aware scoping and AI slop detection — blame-aware diff filtering, framework-specific IDOR heuristics, 14 AI slop patterns, performance profiling, WCAG 2.2 dynamic ARIA state detection, interactive findings management with accept/filter/fix workflow, and severity-ranked findings with optional fix application.

plugins.name: rad-chrome-extension
plugins.description: Comprehensive MV3 Chrome extension development standards — WXT framework architecture, MV3 security, permission minimization, typed messaging, storage patterns, service worker lifecycle, React UI, testing, and Chrome Web Store troubleshooting.

plugins.name: rad-a11y
plugins.description: Digital accessibility toolkit for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance — semantic HTML, ARIA authoring practices, keyboard navigation, focus management, color contrast, motion/animation, form accessibility, SVG accessibility, and automated testing with axe-core.

plugins.name: rad-website-design
plugins.description: Vision implementer for 2026 web design — translates a vision into code that meets modern standards, and proposes concrete fixes for existing sites. Nine skills across knowledge layer (must-do baseline, should-do recommendations, severity-tiered anti-patterns with damage cited from real research, aesthetic direction with Calm UX default, agentic UX patterns Intent Preview/Autonomy Dial/Action Audit, AEO/llms.txt) and action layer (implement = vision-to-code, improve = identify+propose fixes for source or live URLs, review = pure static report). One autonomous reviewer agent, three pure-stdlib Python validators (viewport-meta, pure-bw, tap-targets), six slash commands. Honest scope: does not brainstorm or plan (use rad-brainstormer / rad-planner upstream), does not run Lighthouse, does not take screenshots, does not render JS SPAs. Pair with chrome-devtools-mcp for runtime/visual layer.

plugins.name: rad-supabase
plugins.description: End-to-end Supabase development and operations — projects, database, migrations, edge functions, auth, storage, realtime, branching, security, and troubleshooting. Covers both Supabase CLI and Supabase MCP tool usage.

plugins.name: rad-coolify-orchestrator
plugins.description: End-to-end Coolify self-hosted PaaS management — deployments, databases, security, CI/CD, troubleshooting, observability, and multi-server infrastructure. Coolify v4 self-hosted.

plugins.name: rad-1password
plugins.description: End-to-end 1Password CLI (op) coverage — secret references (op://...), `op inject`/`op run`/`op read` for keeping secrets out of code and shell history, item CRUD with assignment statements and JSON templates, vault and user provisioning with granular permissions, SSH key generation and use, third-party CLI auth via `op plugin run`, and service-account / Connect-server patterns for CI/CD and headless servers. 1 router skill, 6 topical sub-skills, 4 slash commands. Cross-checked against op v2.34.0 --help.

plugins.name: rad-brainstormer
plugins.description: Collaborative ideation using proven methodologies (SCAMPER, Six Hats, Reverse Brainstorming, 5 Whys, HMW), domain research, structured evaluation, and design sprints.

plugins.name: rad-seo-optimizer
plugins.description: Comprehensive SEO auditing, AEO/GEO optimization, competitor intelligence, keyword discovery, link building, content strategy, schema markup, and E-E-A-T optimization.

plugins.name: rad-writer
plugins.description: Domain-smart writing across 9 content types with AI pattern avoidance — email, blog, web copy, business reports, research, presentations, prose, technical docs, and social media. 4 skills, 2 agents, 13 reference files.

plugins.name: rad-context-prompter
plugins.description: Production-grade prompt engineering toolkit — systematic tool-specific routing across 30+ AI platforms, anti-pattern diagnostics, technique selection matrix, prompt decompilation, autonomous debugging, context engineering for agentic systems, and reusable templates.

plugins.name: rad-agentic-company-builder
plugins.description: Scaffold and configure an AI-agent-driven company infrastructure — folder hierarchies, CLAUDE.md files, agent definitions, skills, hooks, MCP configs, and operational patterns based on The Agentic Bible 2026.

plugins.name: rad-para-second-brain
plugins.description: Active PARA system management — weekly review automation, folder structure auditing, Progressive Summarization, Intermediate Packet assembly, Hemingway Bridge session handoffs, and 12 Favorite Problems workshop.

plugins.name: rad-session
plugins.description: **5.0** — Make agent sessions remember each other — across machines, across agents (Claude + Codex). Built around the canonical doc structure aligned with published OpenAI/Anthropic project-structure research: operating manual conditional on agent scope (CLAUDE.md and/or AGENTS.md), `docs/status.md` (evidence-based reality), `docs/planning/current.md` (intent; rad-planner-owned), `docs/planning/archive/` (shipped-milestone journal), `docs/decisions/`. `/init` scaffolds the operating manual's Operational sections only (sectioned-writer rule with rad-planner), `docs/status.md`, `.rad/profile`, plus `.claude/settings.json` / `.codex/config.toml` per scope. `/startup` reads everything in <5s — doorman model. `/wrapup` writes `docs/status.md` from EVIDENCE (git diff, test output, plan-task state) — not chat synthesis; detects candidate decisions mechanically; runs cross-doc validators; archives shipped milestones; auto-commits + prompts to push. Mode-aware (mentor: teaches and drafts; dev: terse). Anomaly-gated final output (silent on success). Cross-machine continuity built-in. Pairs with rad-planner; works standalone.

plugins.name: rad-gws-core
plugins.description: Google Workspace core integration — 14 essential skills covering Gmail (send, read, reply, triage), Docs (write), Sheets (read, append), Slides, Drive, and Calendar. Requires the gws CLI binary.

plugins.name: rad-planner
plugins.description: **4.0** — Plan-first project planning with four entry points (full plan / improvement / drift assessment / pivot) detected from utterance + project state, plus a universal four-direction menu as ambiguity fallback. Five-phase conversation (Constitution & Frame → Goal-Backward Scope → Sequence with Size Discipline → Quality Gates → Doc-Set Recommendation) produces the plan; M6 executes the approved doc set per the canonical structure aligned with published OpenAI/Anthropic project-structure research (operating manual conditional on agent scope, docs/vision.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/planning/current.md, docs/status.md scaffold, docs/decisions/, optional roadmap.md). Four mechanical validators back the workflow: plan-lint (current.md sections + AC format + vague language), status-validator (freshness + 8-section + evidence-based results), doc-redundancy (cross-doc Jaccard duplicates), doc-contradiction (vision non-goals vs current ACs). Always-teaches in /plan; mentor vs dev mode in .rad/profile gates /wrapup teaching depth. Pairs with rad-session for the full lifecycle; works standalone.
